Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The scratching of pencils echoes[n]throughout the art room...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}As of today, I'm quitting the club. I'd like a new club leader to be chosen from the second-years.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I have to study for my entrance exams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I'm going to med school, getting my license, and becoming a doctor![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 100}Did your dad say you had to quit because you have to take over the hospital?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}My dad has nothing to do with this. I made this decision for myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I'm going to have to turn down the opportunity to study abroad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}And since I'm so behind on my studies, I'll have to pull a lot of all-nighters to catch up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 108 1 25 25}I really enjoyed leading the club, so thank you all for everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 5 21 0 150}There's something different about you, Keisuke-senpai. You seem... way more confident.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 108 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Hey, you're giving me too much credit![n]{f 1 1}
